name: Cornbread Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the lard or bacon fat in a skillet over medium flame.
2. Add the ground beef, onion, and garlic to the skillet.
3. Cook and stir for 6-8 minutes until the onions are softened and all the redness has disappeared from the beef.
4. Add the tomatoes, bran, chili powder, oregano, cumin, and salt; stir to mix well.
5. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Combine the remaining ingredients; mix well.
7. Spread over the beef mixture as for dumplings or as a crust. Bake at 400 degrees for 30 minutes until the crust is lightly browned.
8. Serve hot.
